goals.title: This is not simple webcam heart-rate measurement. Implement a measure...
goals.objective: This is not simple webcam heart-rate measurement. Implement a measurement-method improvement study: simultaneously measure skin ROI and reference ROI in a single webcam video, use skin/reference reflected-light ratio to reduce common illumination and camera auto-exposure noise, then compare it to baseline rPPG methods.
goals.evidence: Implemented the reference-corrected measurement-study architecture: capture now records simultaneous skin/reference ROI RGB, preprocessing preserves reference channels and computes absorbance ratios, rPPG methods compare raw/normalized/reference-corrected signals, plots/report/README frame the work as measurement-method improvement. Verified with .venv/bin/python -m py_compile main.py src/*.py and demo run generated required CSV/report/7 graph artifacts with ref_green peak.

goals.title: Recommended title: "피부 ROI와 기준 ROI의 반사광 비율을 이용한 참조 보정형 rPPG 심박 신호 추출 연구"
goals.objective: Recommended title: "피부 ROI와 기준 ROI의 반사광 비율을 이용한 참조 보정형 rPPG 심박 신호 추출 연구"
goals.evidence: README title updated to '피부 ROI와 기준 ROI의 반사광 비율을 이용한 참조 보정형 rPPG 심박 신호 추출 연구'.

goals.title: Core inquiry: "피부 ROI와 기준 ROI의 반사광 비율을 이용하면, 단일 Green 채널 방식보다 조명 변화와...
goals.objective: Core inquiry: "피부 ROI와 기준 ROI의 반사광 비율을 이용하면, 단일 Green 채널 방식보다 조명 변화와 카메라 자동 노출에 강한 rPPG 심박 신호를 추출할 수 있는가?"
goals.evidence: README and report_summary text include the core inquiry comparing skin/reference reflectance ratio against single Green under lighting/exposure noise.

goals.title: Explain reference ROI purpose, common illumination-noise cancellation...
goals.objective: Explain reference ROI purpose, common illumination-noise cancellation principle, relative reflectance/absorbance interpretation, and comparison with 기존 Green 방식.
goals.evidence: report_summary.txt explains reference ROI purpose, common illumination cancellation, and relative reflectance/absorbance principle; README mirrors the physics background.

goals.title: User selects skin ROI and reference ROI from the first frame.
goals.objective: User selects skin ROI and reference ROI from the first frame.
goals.evidence: capture_webcam_rgb and capture_video_rgb select skin ROI then reference ROI from the first frame via choose_roi and choose_reference_roi.

goals.title: skin ROI is forehead/cheek exposed skin; reference ROI is wall/clothe...
goals.objective: skin ROI is forehead/cheek exposed skin; reference ROI is wall/clothes/background/hair/non-blood-flow region.
goals.evidence: ROI prompts instruct skin ROI as forehead/cheek and reference ROI as wall/clothes/background/non-blood-flow region; README documents the same.

goals.title: Store per-frame mean R,G,B for both ROIs.
goals.objective: Store per-frame mean R,G,B for both ROIs.
goals.evidence: capture records per-frame skin_R/skin_G/skin_B and ref_R/ref_G/ref_B while keeping R/G/B skin aliases; preprocessing preserves and resamples both ROIs.

goals.title: Compute methods:
goals.objective: Compute methods:
goals.evidence: rppg_methods.extract_rppg_signals computes raw_green, normalized_green, skin_rgb_combination, ref_green, and ref_rgbdiff when reference columns exist.

goals.title: raw Green: s_raw(t) = G_skin(t)
goals.objective: raw Green: s_raw(t) = G_skin(t)
goals.evidence: raw_green method uses df['G'] as G_skin(t), then shares the same band-pass/FFT metrics pipeline.

goals.title: normalized Green: g_skin(t), normalized from skin RGB itself
goals.objective: normalized Green: g_skin(t), normalized from skin RGB itself
goals.evidence: normalized_green method uses g_norm from skin RGB mean normalization in signal_processing.add_normalized_channels.

goals.title: reference absorbance channels:
goals.objective: reference absorbance channels:
goals.evidence: signal_processing.add_reference_absorbance_channels computes A_R, A_G, A_B = -log((skin+eps)/(ref+eps)).

goals.title: reference-corrected Green: s_ref_green(t) = A_G(t)
goals.objective: reference-corrected Green: s_ref_green(t) = A_G(t)
goals.evidence: ref_green method uses A_G(t) from reference absorbance columns.

goals.title: reference-corrected RGB difference: s_ref_rgbdiff(t) = 2*A_G(t)-A_R(t...
goals.objective: reference-corrected RGB difference: s_ref_rgbdiff(t) = 2*A_G(t)-A_R(t)-A_B(t)
goals.evidence: ref_rgbdiff method computes 2*A_G(t)-A_R(t)-A_B(t).

goals.title: For each method, apply band-pass filter, FFT, detect f_peak, BPM = 60...
goals.objective: For each method, apply band-pass filter, FFT, detect f_peak, BPM = 60*f_peak, peak_strength, and SNR-like/peak-quality metric.
goals.evidence: analyze_rppg_methods applies bandpass_filter and estimate_bpm_fft to every method, yielding f_peak, BPM, peak_strength, and snr_like in result_summary.csv.

goals.title: Produce side-by-side comparison graphs: time-domain signals and FFT s...
goals.objective: Produce side-by-side comparison graphs: time-domain signals and FFT spectra for baseline and reference-corrected methods.
goals.evidence: plotting creates 07_baseline_vs_reference.png with side-by-side filtered time signals and FFT spectra plus all-method plots.

goals.title: Produce report_summary.txt in Korean covering: why reference ROI is u...
goals.objective: Produce report_summary.txt in Korean covering: why reference ROI is used; how common lighting variation is removed; results compared to existing method; suggested experiments (lighting-change robustness and reference ROI location comparison if supported).
goals.evidence: utils.write_report_summary writes Korean explanation of reference ROI reason, common noise cancellation, comparisons, and experiment suggestions.

goals.title: Keep implementation aligned with the repo’s existing patterns and UI/...
goals.objective: Keep implementation aligned with the repo’s existing patterns and UI/CLI structure. Avoid unnecessary new dependencies.
goals.evidence: Implementation reuses existing modules (capture, roi, signal_processing, rppg_methods, plotting, utils, main) and adds no new dependencies.

goals.title: Verify with available tests/lint/build or the smallest meaningful loc...
goals.objective: Verify with available tests/lint/build or the smallest meaningful local validation.
goals.evidence: Verified with .venv/bin/python -m py_compile main.py src/*.py and .venv/bin/python main.py --mode demo --bpm 72 --duration 20 --noise 0.03 --output-dir outputs/verify_ref; generated required methods and artifacts.

goals.title: rPPG processing supports both skin and reference ROI.
goals.objective: rPPG processing supports both skin and reference ROI.
goals.evidence: Processing supports skin/reference ROI in webcam/video capture, CSV preprocessing with optional reference columns, and synthetic demo reference data.

goals.title: All required methods and metrics are implemented.
goals.objective: All required methods and metrics are implemented.
goals.evidence: Demo result_summary.csv contained raw_green, normalized_green, skin_rgb_combination, ref_green, and ref_rgbdiff with BPM/f_peak/peak_strength/snr_like.

goals.title: Output graph/report artifacts are generated by the app/script.
goals.objective: Output graph/report artifacts are generated by the app/script.
goals.evidence: Demo generated rgb_timeseries.csv, result_summary.csv, report_summary.txt, and 01-07 PNG graph artifacts including baseline_vs_reference.

goals.title: Verification evidence is recorded.
goals.objective: Verification evidence is recorded.
goals.evidence: Final verification evidence recorded: py_compile and post-cleaner demo passed; demo produced required CSV/report/graph artifacts and all required rPPG methods/metrics; ai-slop-cleaner no-op pass passed; final code review APPROVE with architectural status CLEAR.
